/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/configHandler.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/discordrpc.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/libopensubsonic/crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/libopensubsonic/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/libopensubsonic/httpclient.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/libopensubsonic/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/libopensubsonic/endpoint_ping.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/external/cJSON.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/external/cJSON_Utils.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/external/libcurl_uriescape.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/external/md5.c.o CMakeFiles/ossp.dir/external/sqlite3/sqlite3.c.o -o ossp.app/Contents/MacOS/ossp   -L/opt/ossp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ossp/lib /opt/ossp/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/ossp/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd external/discord-rpc/src/libdiscord-rpc.a -lbz2 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lintl -lavformat -lavcodec -lswresample -lavutil -lz -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework VideoToolbox -framework CoreServices -framework AudioToolbox -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework VideoToolbox -framework CoreServices -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework VideoToolbox -framework CoreServices -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework VideoToolbox -framework CoreServices -lavutil -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework VideoToolbox -framework CoreServices -lavformat -lavutil /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -lpthread -framework AppKit, -mmacosx-version-min=10.10 -framework AppKit -lavcodec -lswresample -lz -framework Security
